---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
  typst:
    output-file: "Frenken_Robert_CV.pdf"
    margin:
      x: 1in
      y: 0.75in
    fontsize: 11pt
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="typst"}
**Robert Frenken**
frenken.2@osu.edu | Columbus, OH
:::

[Download CV (PDF)](Frenken_Robert_CV.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

## Education

### Ph.D. in Industrial & Systems Engineering {.cv-entry}
*The Ohio State University* | 2024 -- Present (Expected 2027)
GPA: 3.82/4.0

### M.S. in Industrial & Systems Engineering {.cv-entry}
*The Ohio State University* | 2021 -- 2024
GPA: 3.82/4.0

### B.S. in Industrial & Systems Engineering {.cv-entry}
*The Ohio State University* | 2016 -- 2021
GPA: 3.61/4.0

## Professional Experience

### Graduate Research Associate {.cv-entry}
*Center for Automotive Research, The Ohio State University* | 2024 -- Present

- Developing graph neural network-based intrusion detection systems for Controller Area Network (CAN) bus security
- Designing knowledge distillation pipelines to compress multi-layer Graph Attention Networks into deployable student models
- Building automated ML experimentation infrastructure with Ray, Weights & Biases, and SLURM on Ohio Supercomputer Center
- Engineering a DuckDB-based analytics lakehouse for experiment tracking across 500+ hyperparameter configurations

### Graduate Research Associate {.cv-entry}
*Spine Research Institute, The Ohio State University* | 2021 -- 2024

- Applied machine learning methods to biomechanical data for injury risk prediction
- Developed predictive models for spinal loading during manual material handling tasks
- Processed and analyzed motion capture and force plate data for large-scale ergonomic studies

### Data Science Intern {.cv-entry}
*Ford Motor Company* | Summer 2020

- Developed predictive analytics models for vehicle quality improvement initiatives
- Built automated data pipelines for manufacturing defect detection and classification
- Presented findings to cross-functional engineering teams

### Machine Learning Research Assistant {.cv-entry}
*The Ohio State University* | 2020 -- 2021

- Conducted research on machine learning applications for industrial systems optimization
- Implemented and benchmarked deep learning models for time-series prediction tasks

### Quality Systems Data Analyst Co-op {.cv-entry}
*Momentive Performance Materials* | 2019

- Analyzed manufacturing process data to identify root causes of quality deviations
- Developed statistical process control dashboards for real-time quality monitoring
- Automated data collection and reporting workflows, reducing manual effort by 30%

### Project Engineering Co-op {.cv-entry}
*DuPont* | 2018

- Supported capital improvement projects totaling over $1M in facility upgrades
- Conducted time studies and process analysis resulting in 10% efficiency improvement
- Collaborated with operations teams to implement lean manufacturing improvements

## Publications

1. **R. Frenken**, K. Rao, Q. Lin, and A. Saez-Trumper, "KD-GAT: Combining Knowledge Distillation and Graph Attention Transformer for a Controller Area Network Intrusion Detection System," in *Proc. IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC)*, 2025. [PDF](files/IEEE_ITSC_2025-2.pdf)

2. **R. Frenken**, K. Rao, Q. Lin, and A. Saez-Trumper, "Federated Knowledge Distillation for CAN Bus Intrusion Detection," submitted to *AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence*, 2026. *(Under review)*

## Projects

### CAIS Capstone Project {.cv-entry}
*The Ohio State University*

- Led team capstone project applying data science methods to real-world industrial problems

### Webmaster {.cv-entry}
*Buckeye Disc Golf Club, The Ohio State University*

- Designed and maintained the club website

## Skills

### Coursework
Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Statistical Learning, Optimization, Stochastic Models, Simulation, Data Mining, Computer Vision, Probability & Statistics

### Technical
**Languages:** Python, R, SQL, JavaScript, Bash | **ML/DL:** PyTorch, PyTorch Geometric, Ray, scikit-learn, Weights & Biases | **Data:** DuckDB, Pandas, NumPy, Apache Arrow | **Tools:** Git, SLURM, Docker, Quarto, D3.js | **Cloud/HPC:** Ohio Supercomputer Center, GitHub Actions

## Service

- **Reviewer**, IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC), 2025
- **Reviewer**, AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 2025

## Mentorship

### Hanqin Zhang {.cv-entry}
*Undergraduate Research Mentee, The Ohio State University*

- Mentoring undergraduate researcher on graph neural network methods for CAN bus intrusion detection
